title: Dapr monitoring dashboards are using the now deprecated 'graph' visualization in grafana
body: The [Dapr monitoring dashboards](https://github.com/dapr/dapr/tree/master/grafana) are using a "graph" panel which is [now deprecated](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/issues/49670) and not available at all in newer grafana versions.

comments.body: This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has not had activity in the last 90 days. It will be closed in the next 7 days unless it is tagged (pinned, good first issue, help wanted or triaged/resolved) or other activity occurs. Thank you for your contributions.

Hi everyone,

I'd like to work on this issue if it's still available.

I'll start by investigating the existing dashboard definitions and identifying the deprecated graph panels that need to be migrated to the newer Grafana visualisations.

Please let me know if there are any specific guidelines or if someone is already working on this.

Thanks!
